name: penumbra-rhino-00-smoke
description: Penumbra overlay harness smoke (gate ▣0). Runs PenumbraShow so the Penumbra plug-in renders its built-in box-minus-sphere demo as a viewport overlay, waits for a REAL (non-companion) presented frame via WaitForPenumbraFrame, then captures. Proves the whole harness chain — plug-in load, node host, render, conduit blit, frame-ready gate, and Rhino's CaptureToBitmap including the conduit foreground — on the known-good demo, before any fix is tested. Requires the Penumbra Rhino plug-in registered for auto-load in this Rhino instance (like kbridge requires KinematicImporter).

setup.vlmDescription: A Penumbra SDF render drawn as an overlay filling the Rhino viewport: a solid orange/tan box with a large spherical bite carved out of one corner, lit with soft shading. NOT an empty grey Rhino viewport, and NOT a plain featureless sphere.
